description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/wahomekevin/web-starter:latest, runs only on the master branch, executes the command `sh $APP_PATH/run.sh`, and publishes the ./public/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that depends on the build job, uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/wahomekevin/website-deploy:latest, runs only on master, and runs `sh $APP_PATH/sync.sh` to sync the built site for deployment.
